meta.shape: 12 policies x 8 seeds x 3 representative orders = 288 runs

riskSemantics.detectedOverclaimFindings: DETECTION metric: findings surfaced by deterministic audit coverage, not actual generated risk.
riskSemantics.latentRiskEstimate: EXPOSURE metric: estimated hidden risk used for risk comparison.
riskSemantics.auditCoverageRate: Deterministic structural coverage proxy used only inside study artifacts.

policies.label: Baseline hierarchical
policies.description: G28-linked hierarchical baseline with no policy adjustment.

policies.label: Speed flat-like
policies.description: Flat-mode policy optimized for delivery speed and low coordination.

policies.label: Quality hierarchy
policies.description: Hierarchical policy with stronger merge judgment and validation.

policies.label: Audit heavy
policies.description: Policy that spends coordination budget on audit coverage and validation.

policies.label: Handoff optimized
policies.description: Policy emphasizing clearer handoffs and lower coordination drag.

policies.label: Merge optimized
policies.description: Policy emphasizing lead selection and final artifact merge quality.

policies.label: Low coordination
policies.description: Hierarchical policy constrained to minimize coordination overhead.

policies.label: High fan-out
policies.description: Policy that fans out more work and accepts higher coordination load.

policies.label: Extra worker
policies.description: Policy adding worker capacity while keeping one lead.

policies.label: Extra lead
policies.description: Policy adding one cell lead to reduce bottlenecks on review-heavy work.

policies.label: Balanced org
policies.description: Policy balancing merge quality, handoff clarity, audit coverage, and staffing.

policies.label: Risk-averse org
policies.description: Policy prioritizing latent-risk reduction and evidence discipline.
